summary: CORE ARCHITECTURE: ENGINEERING MANUAL - Defines the Spectrum Failover Protocol (Gemini 3.1 Pro -> 3 Flash -> 2.1 Pro -> 1.5 Pro). Details the Credential Crunch Accounting (Ledger and Credit Normalization). Enforces Hardware Stewardship (8GB/16GB checks for local mode) and mandates the project be built as an isolated standalone executable.
